message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for pool.rs (+24) and tantivy_reindex.rs (+11) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Pool: into_parts decompose/guard-release, try_acquire variants, evict_idle
direct call, put at max capacity drops, config/stats/error serde+debug+display.
Tantivy reindex: dedup delete_by_event_id calls, commit failure propagation,
pipeline accessor methods, multi-batch progress accumulation, mixed integrity
report with both missing and mismatched entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
